Write a paper title for a hypothetical research paper about failure
modes in LLM-driven workflow orchestration.

Acceptance criteria (the judge must score against these and cite
which items are unmet in feedback):

  1. exact_12_words: The title must be exactly 12 words. Not 11, not
     13. Exactly 12.
  2. contains_phrase: The title must contain the phrase
     "workflow orchestration".
  3. ends_question: The title must end with a question mark.

Output the title only. One line. No preface, no commentary, no
quotation marks around the title.
